faq.a: A 96 hour event: 72 hour build (Ri3D — Robot in 3 Days) + 24 hour FRC-style competition.
Although experience on a robotics (FRC, FTC, or V5RC) team is highly reccommended, all high school students are welcome to participate
Thanks to our sponsors, Layout Sketch is entirely free to attend.

faq.q: Do I need to bring my own tools?
faq.a: No, we will have tools for you. The full inventory available on-site is listed on the Components page.
